name: docker-compose
content: docker-compose - Multi-container orchestration tool for defining and running complex Docker application stacks.. Capabilities: container.orchestrate.compose, container.orchestrate.stack, container.service.manage, container.network.multi, container.storage.volume, container.logs.tail. Template: docker-compose {all-resources} {ansi} {compatibility} {dry-run} {env-file}

name: docker
content: docker - Container platform for developing, shipping, and running applications in isolated environments.. Capabilities: container.runtime.execute, container.image.build, container.image.publish, container.orchestration.compose, container.storage.volume, container.network.manage. Template: docker {config} {context} {debug} {host} {log-level}

name: make
content: make - Build automation tool for compiling and managing project dependencies using Makefile-based rule definitions.. Capabilities: dev.build.dependency, dev.build.compile, dev.build.clean, dev.build.automate, dev.build.test, dev.build.target, security.privilege-escalation.shell. Template: make {flag-b} {always-make} {directory} {flag-d} {debug}

name: python3
content: python3 - Python programming language interpreter. Capabilities: dev.runtime.python3, dev.runtime.execute. Template: python3 {flag-b} {flag-c} {flag-d} {flag-h} {flag-i}

name: git
content: git - Distributed version control system for tracking changes in source code and coordinating collaborative development.. Capabilities: dev.vcs.log, dev.vcs.branch, dev.vcs.diff, dev.vcs.push, dev.vcs.stash, dev.vcs.merge, dev.vcs.rebase, dev.vcs.status, dev.vcs.pull, dev.vcs.commit, dev.vcs.clone, dev.vcs.tag, security.execution.command, system.file.read, system.file.write. Template: git {action} {repository}

name: AutoTest Knowledge Repository
content: AutoTest Knowledge Repository - Dual-purpose repository for human study and machine-readable automation. Capabilities: . Template: echo root documentation page

name: scapy
content: scapy - Python-based packet crafting and network manipulation framework for packet generation, sniffing, protocol analysis, and network attack development.. Capabilities: network.packet.craft, network.sniff.traffic, network.protocol.analyze, network.attack.arp, network.attack.dns, network.attack.dhcp, network.manipulation.ip. Template: python3 {script} {flags}

name: tcpdump
content: tcpdump - Dump traffic on a network interface. Capabilities: network.capture.tcpdump, network.capture.packet, network.capture.sniff. Template: tcpdump -r {flag-r} -b {flag-b} -B {flag-b} -c {flag-c} --count {count}

name: ifconfig
content: ifconfig - Configure network interfaces. Capabilities: network.config.ifconfig. Template: ifconfig

name: ip
content: ip - Show/manipulate routing, devices, policy routing and tunnels. Capabilities: network.config.ip. Template: ip -h {flag-h}

name: route
content: route - Show/manipulate the IP routing table. Capabilities: network.config.route. Template: route -v {verbose} -n {numeric} -e {extend} -F {fib} -C {cache}

name: ping
content: ping - Network utility for testing reachability and measuring round-trip latency to a remote host.. Capabilities: network.diagnostic.reachability, network.diagnostic.latency, network.diagnostic.packetloss, network.discovery.host. Template: ping {flag-3} {flag-a} {flag-c} {flag-d} {flag-e}

name: traceroute
content: traceroute - Network diagnostic tool for displaying the route and measuring transit delays of packets across an IP network.. Capabilities: network.diagnostic.route, network.diagnostic.hop, network.diagnostic.latency, network.discovery.path. Template: traceroute {flag-4} {flag-6} {debug} {dont-fragment} {first}

name: dig
content: dig - DNS lookup utility for querying name servers and debugging DNS resolution issues.. Capabilities: security.recon.dns, network.dns.query, network.dns.lookup, network.dns.reverse, network.dns.trace, system.file.read. Template: dig {flag-4} {flag-6} {flag-b} {flag-c} {flag-f}

name: iptables
content: iptables - Administration tool for IPv4 firewall rules. Capabilities: network.firewall.iptables. Template: iptables -A {append} -C {check} -D {delete} -D {delete-2} -I {insert}

name: curl
content: curl - Transfers data from or to a server using supported protocols (HTTP, HTTPS, FTP, SFTP, SCP, etc.).. Capabilities: network.transfer.download, network.transfer.upload, network.http.api, network.http.fetch, network.http.inspect, system.file.read, system.file.write. Template: curl {abstract-unix-socket} {append} {aws-sigv4} {cert} {config}

name: wget
content: wget - Non-interactive download utility supporting HTTP, HTTPS, and FTP protocols with recursive download and resume capability.. Capabilities: network.transfer.download, network.mirror.site, network.transfer.recursive, network.transfer.resume, network.http.fetch, network.transfer.upload, security.execution.command, system.file.read, system.file.write. Template: wget {version} {help} {background} {execute} {output-file}

name: ssh
content: ssh - Secure Shell protocol for encrypted remote login, command execution, and file transfer.. Capabilities: network.remote.shell, security.authentication.key, security.authentication.password, network.remote.tunnel, network.remote.filetransfer, network.remote.forward, network.remote.execute, network.transfer.download, network.transfer.upload, security.execution.command, security.privilege-escalation.shell, system.file.read. Template: ssh {flag-4} {flag-6} {flag-a} {flag-b} {flag-b}

name: telnet
content: telnet - Telnet protocol client for remote connections. Capabilities: network.remote.telnet, network.remote.shell. Template: telnet -4 {ipv4} -6 {ipv6} -8 {binary} -a {login} -b {bind}

name: nc
content: nc - Netcat - arbitrary TCP/UDP connections and listening. Capabilities: network.socket.nc, network.socket.connect, network.socket.listen. Template: nc -c {flag-c} -e {flag-e} -b {flag-b} -g {flag-g} -G {flag-g}

name: netcat
content: netcat - Versatile networking utility for reading/writing data across TCP and UDP connections, port scanning, and network debugging.. Capabilities: network.socket.listen, network.socket.connect, network.socket.transfer, network.scan.port, network.proxy.relay, network.diagnostic.banner. Template: netcat {flag-c} {flag-e} {flag-b} {flag-g} {flag-g}

name: socat
content: socat - Multipurpose relay tool for bidirectional data transfer between sockets, pipes, files, and serial ports with SSL support.. Capabilities: network.socket.proxy, network.socket.ssl, network.socket.relay, network.port.redirect, network.socket.udp, network.serial.connect, network.socket.forward, security.execution.command, security.privilege-escalation.shell, system.file.read. Template: socat {flag-h}

name: ftp
content: ftp - File transfer protocol client. Capabilities: network.transfer.ftp, network.transfer.download, network.transfer.upload. Template: ftp -4 {flag-4} -6 {flag-6} -a {flag-a} -b {flag-b} -d {flag-d}

name: scp
content: scp - Secure copy over SSH protocol. Capabilities: network.transfer.scp, network.transfer.download, network.transfer.upload. Template: scp -3 {flag-3} -4 {flag-4} -6 {flag-6} -c {flag-c} -D {flag-d}

name: sftp
content: sftp - Secure file transfer over SSH. Capabilities: network.transfer.sftp, network.transfer.download, network.transfer.upload. Template: sftp -4 {flag-4} -6 {flag-6} -a {flag-a} -B {flag-b} -b {flag-b}

name: Certipy
content: Certipy - Active Directory Certificate Services (AD CS) exploitation tool that finds vulnerable certificate templates, escrows, and performs ESC1-ESC8 attacks for domain privilege escalation.. Capabilities: security.ad.cs.find, security.ad.cs.esc1, security.ad.cs.esc4, security.ad.cs.auth, security.ad.cert.enum. Template: certipy-ad {action}

name: enum4linux-ng
content: enum4linux-ng - Python reimplementation of enum4linux for comprehensive SMB and NetBIOS enumeration of Windows and Active Directory targets.. Capabilities: security.ad.enum.users, security.ad.enum.shares, security.ad.enum.groups, security.ad.enum.passwordpolicy, security.ad.enum.osinfo, security.ad.enum.sessions. Template: enum4linux-ng -A {target}

name: kerbrute
content: kerbrute - Tool for performing Kerberos pre-authentication brute-forcing, user enumeration, and password spraying against Active Directory.. Capabilities: security.ad.kerberos.bruteforce, security.ad.kerberos.userenum, security.ad.kerberos.passwordspray, security.ad.kerberos.preauth. Template: kerbrute userenum -d {domain} -U {userlist} --dc {dc-ip}

name: ldapsearch
content: ldapsearch - LDAP directory search tool for querying Active Directory to enumerate users, groups, computers, organizational units, and domain policies.. Capabilities: security.ad.enum.users, security.ad.enum.groups, security.ad.enum.computers, security.ad.enum.ous, security.ad.enum.gpos, security.ad.ldap.query. Template: ldapsearch -x -H {uri} -b {base-dn}

name: psexec
content: psexec - Impacket psexec — Windows remote command execution via SMB service control manager for lateral movement in Active Directory environments.. Capabilities: security.lateral.psexec, security.shell.remote, security.execution.remote, security.ad.service.control. Template: impacket-psexec {domain}/{user}:{password}@{target}

name: rpcclient
content: rpcclient - Samba RPC client for executing MS-RPC functions against Windows systems for user, group, domain, and privilege enumeration.. Capabilities: security.ad.enum.users, security.ad.enum.groups, security.ad.enum.domain, security.ad.enum.privileges, security.ad.rpc.samr, security.ad.rpc.lsarpc, security.ad.rpc.srvsvc. Template: rpcclient -U {username} {target}

name: rubeus
content: rubeus - Kerberos abuse toolkit for Windows for performing AS-REP roasting, Kerberoasting, pass-the-ticket, S4U attacks, and Kerberos ticket manipulation.. Capabilities: security.ad.kerberos.bruteforce, security.ad.kerberos.asreproast, security.ad.kerberos.kerberoast, security.ad.kerberos.passkey, security.ad.kerberos.delegation, security.credential.kerberostickets. Capabilities: security.credential.dump.ntds, security.credential.dump.sam, security.credential.dump.lsa, security.credential.dump.kerberos, security.credential.extract.hash. Template: impacket-secretsdump -just-dc {domain}/{user}:{password}@{target}

name: sharphound

Capabilities: security.ad.share.list, security.ad.share.access, security.ad.share.download, security.ad.file.transfer. Template: smbclient -L {target} -U {username}

content: smbmap - SMB enumeration tool that provides recursive listing, file download/upload, and command execution across SMB shares on Windows networks.. Capabilities: security.ad.share.list, security.ad.share.download, security.ad.share.upload, security.ad.share.delete, security.ad.share.exec, security.ad.share.content. Template: smbmap -H {target} -u {username} -p {password}

Capabilities: security.lateral.wmi, security.execution.remote, security.shell.remote, security.ad.service.control, security.credential.pth. Template: python3 /usr/share/doc/python3-impacket/examples/wmiexec.py {target} {flags}

name: patator
content: patator - Multi-protocol brute-forcing tool that supports FTP, SSH, HTTP, SMTP, SNMP, and many other services for login credential testing.. Capabilities: brute.ftp.login, brute.ssh.login, brute.http.login, brute.smtp.login, brute.snmp.community, brute.service.login. Template: patator {module} {flag-hosts} {flag-users} {flag-passwords} {flag-port} {flag-threads} {flag-timeout} {flag-max-retries} {flag-output}

name: cewl
content: cewl - Custom wordlist generator that spiders websites to gather unique words for crafting targeted password lists.. Capabilities: security.wordlist.generate, security.crack.password, web.spider.content. Template: cewl {url} -w {output}

name: crunch
content: crunch - Wordlist generator that produces all possible combinations and permutations of specified character sets.. Capabilities: wordlist.generate, wordlist.combination, wordlist.permutation, wordlist.bruteforce. Template: crunch {min} {max} {charset} -o {output}

name: cupp
content: cupp - Common User Passwords Profiler — generates intelligent wordlists based on personal profile information gathered from the target.. Capabilities: wordlist.generate, wordlist.profile, wordlist.social, wordlist.mangle. Template: cupp -i

Capabilities: security.crack.password, security.auth.bruteforce, security.audit.credential, network.auth.test. Template: hydra -l {username} -P {password-list} {target} {service}

name: john
content: john - Leading password cracking tool supporting hundreds of hash types with multiple cracking modes (single, wordlist, incremental, external).. Capabilities: security.crack.password, security.crack.hash, security.audit.credential. Template: john --wordlist={wordlist} {hash-file}

name: medusa
content: medusa - Parallel network login auditor for brute-forcing authentication across multiple protocols and services.. Capabilities: security.crack.password, security.auth.bruteforce, network.auth.test. Template: medusa -h {target} -u {username} -P {password-list} -M {module}

name: ncrack
content: ncrack - High-speed network authentication cracking tool for testing credential strength across multiple network services.. Capabilities: security.crack.password, security.auth.bruteforce, network.auth.test. Template: ncrack -u {username} -P {password-list} {target}:{service}

content: rsmangler - Wordlist mangling/generation tool that takes a base wordlist and applies transformation rules to create variants.. Capabilities: wordlist.mangle, wordlist.transform, wordlist.generate, wordlist.mutate. Template: rsmangler -i {wordlist} -o {output}

name: openssl

name: amass
content: amass - In-depth DNS enumeration, subdomain discovery, and attack surface mapping tool from the OWASP project.. Capabilities: network.discovery.dns, network.discovery.subdomain, security.fingerprint.certificate, security.recon.attack-surface, network.discovery.host. Template: amass enum -d {domain} -o {output}

name: assetfinder
content: assetfinder - Command-line tool that finds domains and subdomains potentially related to a given domain using passive sources.. Capabilities: network.discovery.subdomain, security.recon.passive, network.discovery.domain. Template: assetfinder {domain}

name: BloodHound
content: BloodHound - Active Directory graph-based enumeration tool that maps relationships between users, groups, computers, and permissions to identify attack paths to domain privilege escalation.. Capabilities: security.ad.enum.users, security.ad.enum.groups, security.ad.enum.computers, security.ad.enum.gpos, security.ad.enum.ous, security.ad.attackpath, security.ad.kerberosabuse, security.ad.aclanalysis, security.ad.sessioncollection. Template: bloodhound-python -d {domain} -u {username} -p {password} -ns {nameserver} -c {collection-method}

name: dnsenum
content: dnsenum - Perl-based DNS enumeration tool that performs comprehensive DNS record queries, brute forcing, reverse lookups, and zone transfers.. Capabilities: network.discovery.dns, network.discovery.subdomain, security.recon.dns, service.dns.zone-transfer. Template: dnsenum {domain}

name: fierce
content: fierce - DNS reconnaissance tool for locating non-contiguous IP space, subdomain brute forcing, and reverse DNS lookups.. Capabilities: network.discovery.dns, network.discovery.subdomain, security.recon.dns, network.discovery.ip-range. Template: fierce --domain {domain}

name: maltego
content: maltego - Graphical link analysis and data mining tool for OSINT investigations, entity correlation, and relationship mapping.. Capabilities: security.intel.osint, security.recon.graph, security.intel.correlation, security.intel.link-analysis, security.recon.passive. Template: maltego

name: masscan
content: masscan - High-speed TCP port scanner capable of scanning the entire internet in minutes, supporting banner grab, configurable rate limits, and multiple output formats.. Capabilities: network.scan.port, network.discovery.host, security.fingerprint.service, security.evasion.firewall, network.scan.banner. Template: masscan {target} -p{ports} --rate={rate}

name: nmap
content: nmap - Network discovery and security auditing scanner used for host discovery, port scanning, and service detection.. Capabilities: network.discovery.host, network.scan.port, network.scan.service, security.fingerprint.os, security.fingerprint.service, security.audit.script, security.evasion.firewall. Template: nmap {flag-i} {flag-i-2} {exclude} {excludefile} {flag-s}

name: recon-ng
content: recon-ng - Full-featured reconnaissance framework with modules for OSINT, social engineering, and target profiling across dozens of data sources.. Capabilities: security.intel.osint, security.recon.passive, security.recon.framework, security.intel.email, network.discovery.subdomain, security.intel.contact, security.intel.geolocation. Template: recon-ng -w {workspace}

name: rustscan
content: rustscan - Lightning-fast port scanner written in Rust that automatically pipes results into Nmap for service detection and scripting.. Capabilities: network.scan.port, network.discovery.host, security.fingerprint.service. Template: rustscan -a {target} -p {ports} --batch {batch} --timeout {timeout}

name: spiderfoot
content: spiderfoot - Open-source intelligence automation tool that queries over 200 data sources for email, domain, IP, and web footprinting.. Capabilities: security.intel.osint, security.recon.passive, security.intel.email, network.discovery.subdomain, security.intel.vulnerability, security.intel.breach, security.recon.framework. Template: spiderfoot -s {target}

name: subfinder
content: subfinder - Fast passive subdomain discovery tool from ProjectDiscovery that queries dozens of online sources to find valid subdomains for target domains.. Capabilities: network.discovery.subdomain, security.recon.passive, network.discovery.dns, network.discovery.dns-resolve. Template: subfinder -d {domain} -o {output}

name: sublist3r
content: sublist3r - OSINT subdomain enumeration tool that uses search engines, DNS services, and certificate transparency logs to discover subdomains of a target domain.. Capabilities: dns.enum.subdomain, osint.discovery.subdomain, osint.search.engine. Template: sublist3r {flag-verbose} {flag-no-color} {flag-bruteforce} {flag-threads} {flag-ports} {flag-engines} {flag-output} -d {domain}

name: theHarvester
content: theHarvester - OSINT tool for gathering emails, subdomains, IP addresses, and URLs from public data sources for a target domain.. Capabilities: security.intel.email, network.discovery.subdomain, security.recon.passive, security.intel.osint, security.intel.host. Template: theHarvester -d {domain} -b {source} -l {limit}

name: unfurl
content: unfurl - URL extraction and analysis tool by tomnomnom that parses URLs and extracts components (domains, paths, params, values) for recon and data processing.. Capabilities: web.recon.url-parse, web.recon.url-extract, web.recon.data-filter. Template: unfurl {flag-unique} {mode}

name: waymore
content: waymore - Enhanced wayback machine URL fetcher that retrieves historical URLs from Internet Archive and filters results using customizable patterns.. Capabilities: web.recon.historical-url, osint.discovery.url, web.recon.wayback. Template: waymore {flag-mode} {flag-fetch} {flag-pull} {flag-verbose} -i {target} {flag-output}

name: binwalk
content: binwalk - Firmware analysis tool for extracting filesystems, identifying embedded files, and scanning binary blobs for signatures.. Capabilities: firmware.analysis, file.extraction, signature.scanning, binary.forensics. Template: binwalk -e {firmware-file}

name: checksec
content: checksec - Binary hardening checker that reports PIE, NX, RELRO, Stack Canary, and other security mitigations on ELF binaries.. Capabilities: binary.security.check, hardening.analysis, mitigation.detection. Template: checksec --file={binary}

name: cutter
content: cutter - Qt-based GUI for radare2 providing disassembly, decompilation (via Ghidra/rz-ghidra), and debugging capabilities.. Capabilities: reverse.disassembly, reverse.decompilation, reverse.debugging, reverse.analysis. Template: cutter {binary}

name: gdb
content: gdb - GNU Project debugger for analyzing program execution, reverse engineering binaries, and debugging crashes.. Capabilities: reverse.debugging, reverse.disassembly, reverse.analysis, debug.memory.inspect, debug.register.inspect. Template: gdb -q -ex "{command}" {binary}

name: ghidra
content: ghidra - NSA's reverse engineering framework with disassembly, decompilation, debugging, and scriptable analysis.. Capabilities: reverse.disassembly, reverse.decompilation, reverse.debugging, reverse.analysis, reverse.scripting. Template: ghidra

name: ltrace
content: ltrace - Library call tracer for monitoring dynamic library calls made by a running program.. Capabilities: trace.library.call, reverse.analysis, debug.tracing. Template: ltrace -c {binary}

name: pwntools
content: pwntools - Python CTF framework and exploit development library for binary exploitation, shellcode generation, and ROP chain building.. Capabilities: exploit.development, shellcode.generation, rop.chain, binary.analysis, reverse.patching. Template: python3 -c "from pwn import *; {command}"

name: radare2
content: radare2 - Advanced reverse engineering framework for binary analysis, disassembly, debugging, and patching with scriptable console.. Capabilities: reverse.disassembly, reverse.analysis, reverse.debugging, reverse.patching, reverse.scripting. Template: radare2 -A {binary}

name: ropgadget
content: ropgadget - Tool for finding ROP (Return-Oriented Programming) gadgets in binaries for building ROP chains.. Capabilities: rop.gadget.find, binary.analysis, exploit.development. Template: ROPgadget --binary {binary}

name: strace
content: strace - System call tracer for monitoring syscalls made by a process, useful for debugging and reverse engineering.. Capabilities: trace.syscall, reverse.analysis, debug.tracing. Template: strace -c {binary}

name: gitleaks
content: gitleaks - SAST tool for detecting secrets, passwords, API keys, tokens, and other sensitive data in git repositories.. Capabilities: secrets.scan.repo, secrets.scan.diff, secrets.detect.api-key, secrets.detect.password, secrets.detect.token. Template: gitleaks {flag-verbose} {flag-log-level} {flag-no-git} {flag-format} {flag-exit-code} {flag-redact} {flag-config} {flag-repo-path} {flag-repo-url}

name: Wireshark
content: Wireshark - World's most popular network protocol analyzer for live traffic capture and offline pcap analysis with deep inspection of hundreds of protocols.. Capabilities: network.sniff.packet, network.analyze.protocol, network.capture.live, network.capture.offline, security.forensics.pcap, network.filter.display, network.filter.capture. Template: wireshark -i {interface} -k

name: sqlninja
content: sqlninja - SQL Server injection and takeover tool that exploits blind SQL injection vulnerabilities for privilege escalation, command execution, and data extraction.. Capabilities: sqli.blind-exploit, sqli.mssql-inject, sqli.cmd-exec, sqli.privilege-escalation, sqli.data-exfil. Template: sqlninja {flag-mode} {flag-payload} {flag-timeout} -f {conf}

name: sslscan
content: sslscan - Fast C-based TLS/SSL scanner that checks protocol support, cipher suites, certificate information, and performs comprehensive server configuration analysis.. Capabilities: tls.scan.certificate, tls.scan.cipher, tls.scan.protocol. Template: sslscan {flag-xml} {flag-xmlfile} {flag-no-colour} {flag-no-heartbleed} {flag-ssl2} {flag-ssl3} {flag-tls10} {flag-tls11} {flag-tls12} {flag-tls13} {flag-starttls} {flag-sni} {target}

name: sslyze
content: sslyze - Python-based SSL/TLS scanner that analyzes server configurations for protocol support, cipher strength, certificate validation, and known vulnerabilities.. Capabilities: tls.scan.certificate, tls.scan.cipher, tls.scan.protocol, tls.scan.vulnerability. Template: sslyze {flag-regular} {flag-certinfo} {flag-sslv2} {flag-sslv3} {flag-tlsv1} {flag-tlsv11} {flag-tlsv12} {flag-tlsv13} {flag-starttls} {flag-json} {target}:{port}

name: testssl.sh
content: testssl.sh - Shell script for TLS/SSL testing that checks protocol support, cipher suites, certificate issues, and known vulnerabilities on any TLS server.. Capabilities: tls.scan.certificate, tls.scan.cipher, tls.scan.protocol, tls.scan.vulnerability, tls.scan.heartbleed. Template: testssl.sh {flag-quiet} {flag-color} {flag-severity} {flag-protocols} {flag-ciphers} {flag-json} {flag-html} {flag-csv} {flag-starttls} {target}

name: chisel
content: chisel - Fast TCP/UDP tunnel over HTTP, used for network pivoting and port forwarding through restrictive firewalls using a single binary with no dependencies.. Capabilities: network.tunnel.http, network.forward.port, network.forward.reverse, network.proxy.socks, security.pivot.traffic. Template: chisel server -p {port} --reverse

name: aquatone
content: aquatone - Tool for automatic visual inspection and screenshot capture of websites across large attack surfaces.. Capabilities: web.discovery.asset, web.screenshot.service, web.fingerprint.http, web.enumeration.subdomain. Template: aquatone -out {output-dir} < {input-file}

name: arjun
content: arjun - HTTP parameter discovery tool that finds hidden GET/POST parameters by analyzing server responses.. Capabilities: web.discovery.parameter, web.enumeration.endpoint, web.fingerprint.application. Template: arjun -u {target}

name: burpsuite
content: burpsuite - Integrated platform for web application security testing with proxy, scanner, intruder, repeater, and decoder tools.. Capabilities: web.proxy.intercept, web.scan.active, web.scan.passive, web.fuzzing, web.session.handling, web.decoder, web.repeater, web.intruder. Template: burpsuite

name: cmsmap
content: cmsmap - Content Management System security scanner supporting WordPress, Joomla, Drupal, and Moodle fingerprinting and enumeration.. Capabilities: web.discovery.asset, web.fingerprint.cms, web.enumeration.component, web.vulnerability.scanner, web.enumeration.user. Template: cmsmap -t {target}

name: commix
content: commix - Automated command injection exploitation tool for testing and exploiting OS command injection vulnerabilities.. Capabilities: web.injection.command, web.exploitation.rce, security.exploit.command, web.discovery.injection. Template: commix -u {target} --batch

name: crlfuzz
content: crlfuzz - Fast CRLF injection scanner written in Go that detects HTTP response splitting and header injection vulnerabilities.. Capabilities: web.crlf.detect, web.injection.header, web.response.split. Template: crlfuzz {flag-verbose} {flag-threads} {flag-timeout} {flag-concurrency} {flag-output} {target}

name: dalfox
content: dalfox - Fast parameter analysis and XSS scanner written in Go with WAF detection, mining, and multi-format output.. Capabilities: web.injection.xss, web.analysis.parameter, security.evasion.waf, web.scan.mass. Template: dalfox url {target}

name: dirsearch
content: dirsearch - Advanced web path and content discovery tool for brute-forcing directories and files on web servers.. Capabilities: web.discovery.path, web.discovery.file, web.fingerprint.directory, web.content.brute. Template: dirsearch -u {target} -w {wordlist} -t {threads}

name: dotdotpwn
content: dotdotpwn - Directory traversal fuzzing tool that tests for path traversal vulnerabilities in web applications and services via HTTP, FTP, and TFTP protocols.. Capabilities: web.traversal.fuzz, web.traversal.detect, web.traversal.http, web.traversal.ftp, web.traversal.payload. Template: dotdotpwn {flag-protocol} {flag-port} {flag-depth} {flag-os} {flag-file} {flag-threads} {flag-dictionary} {flag-cookie} {flag-output} {flag-url} -m {target}

name: feroxbuster
content: feroxbuster - Fast, recursive content discovery tool written in Rust for directory and file brute-forcing with automatic filtering and Burp integration.. Capabilities: web.discovery.path, web.discovery.file, web.discovery.recursive, web.content.brute, web.filter.response. Template: feroxbuster -u {target} -w {wordlist} -x {extensions}

name: ffuf
content: ffuf - Fast web fuzzer written in Go for directory discovery, parameter fuzzing, virtual host enumeration, and value brute-forcing.. Capabilities: web.fuzzing.directory, web.fuzzing.parameter, web.discovery.vhost, web.fuzzing.value, web.content.brute, web.filter.response. Template: ffuf -u {target} -w {wordlist} -t {threads}

name: gau
content: gau - Get All URLs (gau) fetches known URLs from AlienVault's OTX, WayBack Machine, and other public archives for passive endpoint discovery.. Capabilities: web.discovery.endpoint, web.archive.url, security.recon.passive, web.enumeration.parameter. Template: gau {target} {flags}

name: ghauri
content: ghauri - Advanced SQL injection detection and exploitation tool written in Go with support for multiple DBMS and injection techniques.. Capabilities: web.attack.sql-injection, web.vulnerability.scanner, web.exploit.database, web.enumeration.schema, web.enumeration.table. Template: ghauri -u {target} --batch

name: gobuster
content: gobuster - Multi-purpose brute-force tool for directory/file discovery, DNS subdomain enumeration, and cloud bucket enumeration.. Capabilities: web.discovery.path, web.discovery.file, web.discovery.vhost, web.discovery.dns, web.discovery.bucket, web.content.brute. Template: gobuster dir -u {target} -w {wordlist} -t {threads}

name: h2csmuggler
content: h2csmuggler - HTTP/2 cleartext smuggling tool that exploits connection upgrade to smuggle requests through reverse proxies and load balancers.. Capabilities: web.smuggle.h2c, web.smuggle.detect, web.protocol.h2c-upgrade. Template: h2csmuggler {flag-x} {flag-wait} {flag-proxy} {target}

name: httpx
content: httpx - Fast and multi-purpose HTTP toolkit from ProjectDiscovery for probing, analyzing, and fingerprinting web servers and services.. Capabilities: web.discovery.endpoint, web.fingerprint.technology, web.probe.http, web.enumeration.asset, security.fingerprint.service. Template: httpx {flags} {target}

name: jdam
content: jdam - JSON fuzzer that tests REST APIs and JSON endpoints for input validation vulnerabilities, schema bypass, and injection flaws.. Capabilities: api.fuzz.json, api.test.validation, api.discovery.endpoint. Template: jdam {flag-method} {flag-header} {flag-cookie} {flag-threads} {flag-proxy} {flag-timeout} {flag-data} -u {url}

name: joomscan
content: joomscan - Joomla CMS vulnerability scanner that detects component versions, known vulnerabilities, and security misconfigurations.. Capabilities: web.discovery.asset, web.fingerprint.cms, web.vulnerability.scanner, web.enumeration.component. Template: joomscan -u {target}

name: kadimus
content: kadimus - LFI (Local File Inclusion) scanning and exploitation tool that detects file inclusion vulnerabilities and leverages them for RCE and file reading.. Capabilities: web.lfi.scan, web.lfi.exploit, web.lfi.rce, web.lfi.read-file. Template: kadimus {flag-scan} {flag-parameter} {flag-command} {flag-data} {flag-cookie} {flag-user-agent} {flag-proxy} -u {url}

name: katana
content: katana - Fast web crawler and spider from ProjectDiscovery for discovering endpoints, assets, and attack surface.. Capabilities: web.discovery.endpoint, web.crawl.spider, web.enumeration.asset, web.discovery.js-source. Template: katana -u {target} -d {depth}

name: lfi-suite
content: lfi-suite - Local File Inclusion exploitation suite that automates LFI detection, file reading, RCE via log poisoning, and PHP wrapper attacks.. Capabilities: web.lfi.scan, web.lfi.exploit, web.lfi.rce, web.lfi.read-file, web.lfi.php-wrapper. Template: python3 lfi.py {flag-type} {flag-os-cmd} {flag-read-file} {flag-shell} {flag-proxy} -t {target}

name: nikto
content: nikto - Web server scanner that tests for dangerous files, outdated server software, and misconfigurations on web servers.. Capabilities: web.scan.vulnerability, web.fingerprint.server, web.discovery.path, web.scan.config. Template: nikto -h {target} -p {port}

name: nuclei
content: nuclei - Fast, template-based vulnerability scanner from ProjectDiscovery that uses YAML templates to scan for CVEs, misconfigurations, and security issues.. Capabilities: web.scan.vulnerability, security.scan.cve, web.scan.misconfiguration, security.scan.automated, network.discovery.vulnerability. Template: nuclei {flags} {target}

name: paramspider
content: paramspider - Tool for mining parameters from web archives to discover hidden endpoints, GET/POST parameters, and potential injection points.. Capabilities: web.discovery.endpoint, web.enumeration.parameter, security.recon.passive, web.archive.url. Template: paramspider {flags} {domain}

name: smuggler
content: smuggler - HTTP request smuggling scanner that detects and tests for CL.TE, TE.CL, and TE.TE smuggling vulnerabilities in web servers and proxies.. Capabilities: web.smuggle.detect, web.smuggle.cl-te, web.smuggle.te-cl, web.smuggle.te-te. Template: smuggler {flag-no-color} {flag-methods} {flag-timeout} -u {url}

name: sqlmap
content: sqlmap - Automatic SQL injection detection and exploitation tool with support for all major DBMS and injection techniques.. Capabilities: web.injection.sql, web.exploitation.database, web.discovery.sqli, security.exploit.sqli. Template: sqlmap -u {target} --batch --level {level} --risk {risk}

name: tplmap
content: tplmap - Server-Side Template Injection (SSTI) exploitation tool that automates detection and exploitation of template injection vulnerabilities across multiple template engines.. Capabilities: web.ssti.detect, web.ssti.exploit, web.ssti.rce, web.ssti.read-file, web.ssti.sandbox-escape. Template: tplmap {flag-data} {flag-cookie} {flag-user-agent} {flag-header} {flag-engine} {flag-os-shell} {flag-os-cmd} {flag-read-file} {flag-level} {flag-proxy} -u {url}

name: waybackurls
content: waybackurls - Tool for fetching historical URLs from the Wayback Machine archive for discovering endpoints, parameters, and attack surface of target domains.. Capabilities: web.discovery.endpoint, web.archive.url, security.recon.passive, web.enumeration.parameter. Template: waybackurls {target} {flags}

name: wfuzz
content: wfuzz - Web application bruteforcer for discovering hidden resources, parameter fuzzing, and content discovery.. Capabilities: web.fuzz, web.discovery.hidden, web.bruteforce.parameters, web.content.discovery. Template: wfuzz -w {wordlist} -u {target}

name: whatweb
content: whatweb - Next-generation web server fingerprinting tool that identifies CMS platforms, frameworks, and technologies.. Capabilities: web.fingerprint, web.discovery.technology, web.recon.cms, security.fingerprint.http. Template: whatweb {target} -v

name: wpscan
content: wpscan - Black-box WordPress vulnerability scanner that detects themes, plugins, users, and security misconfigurations.. Capabilities: web.scan.wordpress, web.discovery.plugin, web.discovery.theme, web.discovery.user, security.vulnerability.scan. Template: wpscan --url {target} -e

name: xsstrike
content: xsstrike - Advanced XSS detection suite with context-aware payload generation, WAF detection/evasion, and DOM XSS scanning.. Capabilities: web.injection.xss, web.discovery.xss, security.evasion.waf, web.scan.dom. Template: python3 xsstrike.py -u {target}

name: owasp-zap
content: owasp-zap - OWASP Zed Attack Proxy — open-source web application security scanner for finding vulnerabilities in web applications and APIs.. Capabilities: web.proxy.intercept, web.scan.active, web.scan.passive, web.fuzzing, web.spider, web.api.scan, web.session.handling. Template: zap -daemon -port {port} -host {host}

name: aircrack-ng
content: aircrack-ng - Complete suite for monitoring, attacking, testing, and cracking WiFi networks, including WEP and WPA/WPA2-PSK.. Capabilities: network.manipulation.sniff, network.crack.wep, network.crack.wpa, network.deauth, network.monitor. Template: aircrack-ng -w {wordlist} {capture-file}

name: bettercap
content: bettercap - Powerful MITM framework for WiFi, Bluetooth, and wired network attacks with an interactive command console.. Capabilities: network.mitm, network.sniff, network.deauth, network.proxy, network.dns.spoof, network.arp.spoof. Template: bettercap -I {interface} -X

name: bluetoothctl
content: bluetoothctl - Command-line Bluetooth controller for device scanning, pairing, and management via BlueZ.. Capabilities: bluetooth.scan, bluetooth.pair, bluetooth.discover, bluetooth.manage. Template: bluetoothctl

name: btlejack
content: btlejack - Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) sniffing and jamming tool for security assessments of BLE devices.. Capabilities: ble.sniff, ble.jam, ble.scan, ble.capture. Template: btlejack -s

name: bully
content: bully - WPS brute-force attack tool similar to Reaver but with improved reliability and performance.. Capabilities: network.wps.bruteforce, network.crack.wpa, network.pin.attack. Template: bully -i {interface} -b {bssid}

name: hcxdumptool
content: hcxdumptool - Tool for capturing WLAN traffic and dumping PMKID and handshake captures for offline WPA cracking with hashcat.. Capabilities: network.capture.pmkid, network.capture.handshake, network.sniff. Template: hcxdumptool -i {interface} -o {output}

name: hcxpcaptool
content: hcxpcaptool - Converts packet capture files to hash formats compatible with hashcat and john for WPA cracking.. Capabilities: network.convert.capture, network.hash.extract, network.hash.pmkid, network.hash.eapol. Template: hcxpcaptool -z {pmkid-output} {capture-file}

name: kismet
content: kismet - Wireless network detector, sniffer, and intrusion detection system for 802.11 networks.. Capabilities: network.detect, network.sniff, network.intrusion.detect, network.enumerate. Template: kismet

name: reaver
content: reaver - WiFi Protected Setup (WPS) PIN brute-force attack tool for recovering WPA/WPA2 passphrases.. Capabilities: network.wps.bruteforce, network.crack.wpa, network.pin.attack. Template: reaver -i {interface} -b {bssid}

name: wifite
content: wifite - Automated wireless attack tool that orchestrates aircrack-ng, reaver, and other tools to audit WiFi networks.. Capabilities: network.audit, network.crack.wep, network.crack.wpa, network.wps.bruteforce, network.deauth, network.pmkid. Template: wifite -i {interface}

name: tar
content: tar - Tape archive utility for creating, extracting, and manipulating archive files.. Capabilities: filesystem.archive.compress, filesystem.archive.list, filesystem.archive.extract, filesystem.archive.incremental, filesystem.archive.create, network.transfer.download, network.transfer.upload, security.execution.command, security.privilege-escalation.shell, system.file.read. Template: tar {catenate} {create} {delete} {diff} {append}

name: gzip
content: gzip - File compression utility using the DEFLATE algorithm for reducing file sizes with optional decompression and stream processing.. Capabilities: filesystem.compress.gzip, filesystem.decompress.gzip, filesystem.compress.stream, filesystem.archive.compress. Template: gzip {stdout} {decompress} {force} {help} {keep}

name: base64
content: base64 - Base64 encode/decode data. Capabilities: system.file.base64, system.file.search, system.file.process, system.file.copy, system.file.move, system.file.delete. Template: base64 -d {decode} -i {ignore-garbage} -w {wrap}

name: cat
content: cat - Concatenate files and print to standard output. Capabilities: system.file.cat, system.file.search, system.file.process, system.file.copy, system.file.move, system.file.delete. Template: cat -A {show-all} -b {number-nonblank} -e {flag-e} -E {show-ends} -n {number}

name: chmod
content: chmod - Change file mode bits. Capabilities: system.file.chmod, system.file.search, system.file.process, system.file.copy, system.file.move, system.file.delete. Template: chmod -c {changes} -f {silent} -v {verbose} -h {no-dereference} -R {recursive}

name: chown
content: chown - Change file owner and group. Capabilities: system.file.chown, system.file.search, system.file.process, system.file.copy, system.file.move, system.file.delete. Template: chown -c {changes} -f {silent} -v {verbose} -h {no-dereference} -R {recursive}

name: comm
content: comm - Compare two sorted files line by line. Capabilities: system.file.comm, system.file.search, system.file.process, system.file.copy, system.file.move, system.file.delete. Template: comm -1 {flag-1} -2 {flag-2} -3 {flag-3} --check-order {check-order} -z {zero-terminated}

name: cp
content: cp - Copy files and directories. Capabilities: system.file.cp, system.file.search, system.file.process, system.file.copy, system.file.move, system.file.delete. Template: cp -a {archive} -b {flag-b} -d {flag-d} -f {force} -i {interactive}

name: cut
content: cut - Remove sections from each line of files. Capabilities: system.file.cut, system.file.search, system.file.process, system.file.copy, system.file.move, system.file.delete. Template: cut -b {bytes} -c {characters} -d {delimiter} -f {fields} -n {flag-n}

name: dd
content: dd - Convert and copy a file. Capabilities: system.file.dd, system.file.search, system.file.process, system.file.copy, system.file.move, system.file.delete. Template: dd --help {help}

name: diff
content: diff - Compare files line by line. Capabilities: system.file.diff, system.file.search, system.file.process, system.file.copy, system.file.move, system.file.delete. Template: diff --normal {normal} -q {brief} -s {report-identical-files} -c {context} -u {unified}

name: file
content: file - Determine file type. Capabilities: system.file.delete, system.file.file, system.file.search, system.file.process, system.file.copy, system.file.move, system.file.read. Template: file --help {help} -v {version} -m {magic-file-list} -z {uncompress} -Z {uncompress-noreport}

name: find
content: find - Search for files in a directory hierarchy. Capabilities: system.file.find, system.file.delete, system.file.search, system.file.process, system.file.copy, system.file.move, security.execution.command, security.privilege-escalation.shell, system.file.read, system.file.write. Template: find -d {flag-d} -d {flag-d-2} -a {flag-a} -d {flag-d-3} --help {help}

name: head
content: head - Output the first part of files. Capabilities: system.file.head, system.file.search, system.file.process, system.file.copy, system.file.move, system.file.delete. Template: head -c {bytes} -n {lines} -q {quiet} -v {verbose} -z {zero-terminated}

name: hexdump
content: hexdump - Display file contents in hexadecimal. Capabilities: system.file.hexdump, system.file.search, system.file.process, system.file.copy, system.file.move, system.file.delete. Template: hexdump -b {one-byte-octal} -X {one-byte-hex} -c {one-byte-char} -C {canonical} -d {two-bytes-decimal}

name: less
content: less - View file contents page by page. Capabilities: system.file.less, system.file.search, system.file.process, system.file.copy, system.file.move, system.file.delete. Template: less -? {help} -a {search-skip-screen} -A {search-skip-screen} -b {buffers} -B {auto-buffers}

name: ln
content: ln - Create hard and symbolic links. Capabilities: system.file.ln, system.file.search, system.file.process, system.file.copy, system.file.move, system.file.delete. Template: ln --backup {backup} -b {flag-b} -d {directory} -f {force} -i {interactive}

name: md5sum
content: md5sum - Compute and check MD5 message digest. Capabilities: system.file.md5sum, system.file.search, system.file.process, system.file.copy, system.file.move, system.file.delete. Template: md5sum -b {binary} -c {check} -t {text} -z {zero} --ignore-missing {ignore-missing}

name: mv
content: mv - Move/rename files and directories. Capabilities: system.file.mv, system.file.search, system.file.process, system.file.copy, system.file.move, system.file.delete. Template: mv --backup {backup} -b {flag-b} -f {force} -i {interactive} -n {no-clobber}

name: od
content: od - Dump files in octal and other formats. Capabilities: system.file.od, system.file.search, system.file.process, system.file.copy, system.file.move, system.file.delete. Template: od -A {address-radix} -j {skip-bytes} -N {read-bytes} -S {strings} -t {format}

name: patch
content: patch - Apply diff patches to files. Capabilities: system.file.patch, system.file.search, system.file.process, system.file.copy, system.file.move, system.file.delete. Template: patch -p {strip} -F {fuzz-lines} -l {ignore-whitespace} -c {context} -e {ed}

name: rm
content: rm - Remove files or directories. Capabilities: system.file.rm, system.file.search, system.file.process, system.file.copy, system.file.move, system.file.delete. Template: rm -f {force} -i {flag-i} -I {flag-i} -r {recursive} -d {dir}

name: sha1sum
content: sha1sum - Compute and check SHA-1 message digest. Capabilities: system.file.sha1sum, system.file.search, system.file.process, system.file.copy, system.file.move, system.file.delete. Template: sha1sum -b {binary} -c {check} -t {text} -z {zero} --ignore-missing {ignore-missing}

name: sha256sum
content: sha256sum - Compute and check SHA-256 message digest. Capabilities: system.file.sha256sum, system.file.search, system.file.process, system.file.copy, system.file.move, system.file.delete. Template: sha256sum -b {binary} -c {check} -t {text} -z {zero} --ignore-missing {ignore-missing}

name: sort
content: sort - Sort lines of text files. Capabilities: system.file.sort, system.file.search, system.file.process, system.file.copy, system.file.move, system.file.delete. Template: sort -b {ignore-leading-blanks} -d {dictionary-order} -f {ignore-case} -g {general-numeric-sort} -i {ignore-nonprinting}

name: stat
content: stat - Display file or filesystem status. Capabilities: system.file.stat, system.file.search, system.file.process, system.file.copy, system.file.move, system.file.delete. Template: stat -L {dereference} -f {file-system} -c {format} -t {terse} --terse {terse-2}

name: strings
content: strings - Find printable strings in binary files. Capabilities: system.file.strings, system.file.search, system.file.process, system.file.copy, system.file.move, system.file.delete. Template: strings -a {all} -d {data} -f {print-file-name} -n {flag-n} --bytes {bytes}

name: tail
content: tail - Output the last part of files. Capabilities: system.file.tail, system.file.search, system.file.process, system.file.copy, system.file.move, system.file.delete. Template: tail -c {bytes} -f {follow} -F {flag-f} -n {lines} -q {quiet}

name: tr
content: tr - Translate or delete characters. Capabilities: system.file.tr, system.file.search, system.file.process, system.file.copy, system.file.move, system.file.delete. Template: tr -c {complement} -d {delete} -s {squeeze-repeats} -t {truncate-set1} -t {flag-t}

name: uniq
content: uniq - Report or omit repeated lines. Capabilities: system.file.uniq, system.file.search, system.file.process, system.file.copy, system.file.move, system.file.delete. Template: uniq -c {count} -d {repeated} -D {flag-d} -f {skip-fields} -i {ignore-case}

name: wc
content: wc - Print newline, word, and byte counts. Capabilities: system.file.wc, system.file.search, system.file.process, system.file.copy, system.file.move, system.file.delete. Template: wc -c {bytes} -m {chars} -l {lines} -L {max-line-length} -w {words}

name: xargs
content: xargs - Build and execute command lines from standard input. Capabilities: system.file.xargs, system.file.search, system.file.process, system.file.copy, system.file.move, system.file.delete. Template: xargs -0 {null} -a {arg-file} -d {delimiter} -E {flag-e} -e {eof}

name: xxd
content: xxd - Hex dump or reverse hex dump. Capabilities: system.file.xxd, system.file.search, system.file.process, system.file.copy, system.file.move, system.file.delete. Template: xxd -a {flag-a} -b {flag-b} -c {flag-c} -e {flag-e} -g {flag-g}

name: tee
content: tee - Reads from standard input and writes to both standard output and one or more files simultaneously.. Capabilities: data.io.split, data.io.duplicate, filesystem.io.capture. Template: tee {append} {ignore-interrupts} {flag-p}

name: free
content: free - Display amount of free and used memory. Capabilities: system.process.free, system.process.list, system.process.signal, system.process.monitor. Template: free -b {bytes} --kilo {kilo} --mega {mega} --giga {giga} --tera {tera}

name: ionice
content: ionice - Set/get I/O scheduling class and priority. Capabilities: system.process.ionice, system.process.list, system.process.signal, system.process.monitor. Template: ionice -c {class} -n {classdata} -p {pid} -P {pgid} -t {ignore}

name: kill
content: kill - Send signals to processes. Capabilities: system.process.kill, system.process.list, system.process.signal, system.process.monitor. Template: kill -s {flag-s} -n {flag-n} -l {flag-l}

name: nice
content: nice - Run a program with modified scheduling priority. Capabilities: system.process.nice, system.process.list, system.process.signal, system.process.monitor. Template: nice -2 {flag-2} -n {adjustment}

name: ps
content: ps - Report process status. Capabilities: system.process.ps, system.process.list, system.process.signal, system.process.monitor. Template: ps -A {flag-a} -a {flag-a} -d {flag-d} -N {deselect} -C {flag-c}

name: timeout
content: timeout - Run a command with a time limit. Capabilities: system.process.timeout, system.process.list, system.process.signal, system.process.monitor. Template: timeout -f {foreground} -k {kill-after} -p {preserve-status} -s {signal} -v {verbose}

name: top
content: top - Display Linux processes. Capabilities: system.process.top, system.process.list, system.process.signal, system.process.monitor. Template: top -b {batch-mode} -c {cmdline-toggle} -d {delay} -E {scale-summary-mem} -e {scale-task-mem}

name: watch
content: watch - Execute a program periodically. Capabilities: system.process.watch, system.process.list, system.process.signal, system.process.monitor. Template: watch -b {beep} -c {color} -C {no-color} -d {differences} -e {errexit}

name: cron
content: cron - Daemon to execute scheduled commands. Capabilities: system.scheduler.cron, system.scheduler.cron. Template: cron -f {flag-f} -l {flag-l} -n {flag-n} -N {flag-n} -L {flag-l}

name: journalctl
content: journalctl - Query the systemd journal. Capabilities: system.service.journalctl. Template: journalctl --system {system} --user {user} -M {machine} -m {merge} -D {directory}

name: systemctl
content: systemctl - Control the systemd system and service manager. Capabilities: system.service.systemctl. Template: systemctl -h {help} --version {version} --system {system} --user {user} -C {capsule}

name: bash
content: bash - GNU Bourne-Again SHell. Capabilities: system.shell.bash, system.shell.command. Template: bash --debug {debug} -i {flag-i} -a {flag-a}

name: df
content: df - Report filesystem disk space usage. Capabilities: system.storage.df, system.storage.usage, system.storage.mount. Template: df -a {all} -B {block-size} -h {human-readable} -H {si} -i {inodes}

name: du
content: du - Estimate file space usage. Capabilities: system.storage.du, system.storage.usage, system.storage.mount. Template: du -0 {null} -a {all} -A {apparent-size} -B {block-size} -b {bytes}

name: mount
content: mount - Mount a filesystem. Capabilities: system.storage.mount, system.storage.usage, system.storage.mount. Template: mount -a {all} -c {no-canonicalize} -f {fake} -F {fork} -T {fstab}

name: rsync
content: rsync - Fast, versatile file synchronization and transfer tool with delta encoding, compression, and remote sync over SSH.. Capabilities: filesystem.sync.local, filesystem.sync.remote, filesystem.sync.incremental, filesystem.sync.archive, filesystem.transfer.delta, filesystem.backup. Template: rsync {verbose} {info} {debug} {stderr} {quiet}

name: tmux
content: tmux - Terminal multiplexer for managing multiple shell sessions, persistent remote workspaces, and split-pane terminal layouts.. Capabilities: system.terminal.multiplex, system.terminal.session, system.terminal.split, system.process.background, system.session.persist, system.remote.detach. Template: tmux {flag-2} {flag-c} {flag-f} {flag-h} {flag-l}

name: awk
content: awk - Pattern scanning and text processing language for field-oriented data extraction, reporting, and transformation.. Capabilities: text.process.field, text.aggregate.count, text.aggregate.average, text.process.report, data.transform.column, text.transform.csv, text.aggregate.sum, security.execution.command, security.privilege-escalation.shell, system.file.read, system.file.write. Template: awk {flag-f} {flag-f} {flag-v} {flag-b} {flag-c}

name: jq
content: jq - Lightweight and flexible command-line JSON processor for querying, filtering, and transforming JSON data.. Capabilities: text.transform.json, text.query.jsonpath, data.format.pretty. Template: jq {null-input} {raw-input} {slurp} {compact-output} {raw-output}

name: sed
content: sed - Stream editor for parsing and transforming text using pattern matching and substitution operations.. Capabilities: text.transform.substitute, text.transform.delete, text.transform.insert, text.transform.append, text.filter.line, text.process.stream. Template: sed {quiet} {expression} {file} {follow-symlinks} {in-place}

name: grep
content: grep - Powerful text search utility for pattern matching using regular expressions across files and streams.. Capabilities: text.search.regex, text.search.fixed, text.search.recursive, text.search.invert, text.search.context, data.extract.pattern. Template: grep {extended-regexp} {fixed-strings} {basic-regexp} {perl-regexp} {regexp}
